reach_why: Extends continual-learning concerns to durable uncertainty management, but builds on existing calibration, OOD, and benchmark-critique ideas.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links retention gaps, benchmark-shaped meta-learning, and true-but-uninterpreted propositions under fallibilist uncertainty preservation.
falsifiable_why: Test by measuring retained accuracy versus calibration drift, OOD brittleness, and confidence on uninterpreted true statements.
explanation: Reliable continual learning must preserve uncertainty, not just knowledge, because competence can persist while confidence silently drifts.
